name: Sean D Stewart
seeking: Partners with course platforms and speaking circuit organizations for co-created gift-based business programs. Access to creative entrepreneurs and personal growth seekers through summit speaking and community building collaborations.
who_you_serve: He serves aspiring entrepreneurs and individuals looking to develop their business skills and mindset, particularly those in the creative and personal growth sectors.
what_you_do: Sean D Stewart provides business coaching focused on helping individuals build and grow their gift-based businesses through speaking and community engagement.
offering: Event Hosting, Joint Venture Resources, Online Course Creation, Public Speaking, Sales Training, Webinar Training
bio: Trained by Tony Robbins, over 13 years of experience, helped thousands of clients, and has shared stages with prominent figures in the business and personal growth space.
service_provided: 1:1 coaching, group programs, courses, speaking, consulting
social_proof: Helped icons like Brendon Burchard, Dean Graziosi, Les Brown, Marisa Murgitroyd, Lisa Sasevich generate millions from live and virtual events.
business_focus: Sean D Stewart provides business coaching focused on helping individuals build and grow their gift-based businesses through speaking and community engagement.
